description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features large rectangular windows arranged in neat rows, with some windows shaded by horizontal awnings. The exterior walls are finished in a muted beige color, accented by geometric patterns and subtle decorative elements near the roofline. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by tall glass panels and a covered porch area supported by simple columns. The house sits on a patterned tile base, suggesting an urban sidewalk or driveway context. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a symmetrical beige facade accented by awnings and geometric details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, awnings, and decorative roofline details.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a simpler wall with fewer windows and a glimpse of the covered porch area.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and no decorative elements, emphasizing the plainness of the back facade.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a clear view of the patterned tile base and window arrangement.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with tall glass panels, covered porch, and simple columns
